title: Taking Photos 拍照留念
scene: 一家人在旅游景点拍照留念。

lines.en: Dad, can you take a photo of me in front of the fountain?
lines.zh: 爸爸，你能帮我在喷泉前拍张照吗？

lines.en: Sure! Stand right there and smile!
Wait! Let me fix my hair. OK, I'm ready!
lines.zh: 等等！我整理一下头发。好了，我准备好了！

lines.en: Cheese! Let me see! Oh, it looks great!
lines.zh: 茄子！让我看看！哦，拍得真好看！

lines.en: Now let's take a family photo. Excuse me, could you help us?
lines.zh: 现在我们来拍全家福。打扰一下，您能帮我们拍吗？

lines.en: Sure, I'll take the picture! Everyone stand together!
lines.zh: 当然，我来拍！大家站在一起！

lines.en: Move closer, Mom. Put your arm around Lucy.
lines.zh: 靠近一点，妈妈。把手搭在露西肩上。

lines.en: Is everyone in the frame? Ready? Let's take two just in case.
lines.zh: 所有人都在画面里了吗？准备好了吗？我们拍两张以防万一。

lines.en: Got it! They both look perfect! What a wonderful memory!
lines.zh: 拍好了！两张都拍得很好！多美好的回忆！
